signupData.goalsElaboration: Maintain strength and muscle mass for healthy aging. Joint health, mobility, stay athletic. Long-term health focus, no specific timeline.
signupData.injuries: Arthritis in right shoulder, previous meniscus surgery (left knee). Needs longer warm-up. Avoids heavy overhead pressing and max effort lifts.
signupData.experienceElaboration: Former college basketball player. Lifted on/off for 20 years, consistent last 3 years. Focused on healthy aging and sustainable training.

onboardingMessages: I'm 51 and want to maintain my strength and muscle mass as I age. Joint health and mobility are big priorities for me.
I go to the YMCA 3 days a week - Mon/Wed/Fri at 6 AM, about 60 minutes. Standard gym equipment.
I have arthritis in my right shoulder and had meniscus surgery on my left knee. I need longer warm-ups and avoid heavy overhead pressing and max effort work.
